description:
Operating Area: Turkey, Greece

UBI BENE is a 44-m luxury sailing yacht built by Valena Yachting shipyard in Istanbul. She offers ultra-modern and comfortable accommodation for 10 guests in 5 ensuite cabins. Each stateroom onboard UBI BENE sailing yacht features a TV, DVD, Music system, air-conditioning.
For those who dream sailing along the Turkish coast with style, UBI BENE Is an ideal option. Her professional crew of 6 assists with everything the guests may need during a yacht charter. There's plenty of space outdoors to socialize - a dining table aft deck together with cushioned area for lounging, a sundeck with mattresses.
Guests are welcome to enjoy the amazing sailing experience when the crew opens the sails and turns off the engines. This is the moment of freedom and peace for everyone to enjoy.

blueprint.name: UBI BENE
entertainment: TV in the saloon and all cabins
CD/DVD in all cabins and the saloon

crew.name: Erhan Selcuk
crew.bio:
With 22 years of maritime experience, Captain Ercan is a seasoned captain who warmly welcomes guests aboard UBI BENE. Throughout his extensive career, Ercan has gained a wealth of knowledge and expertise which he uses to transform every voyage into an unforgettable adventure for his guests.

As he is a licensed captain, Ercan excels at ensuring a safe and comfortable voyage. His leadership, coupled with his trustworthy and composed approach, fosters a peaceful environment for both the crew and guests. His professionalism in managing the yacht, along with his deep love for the sea, ensures that every journey offers guests a unique and enriching travel experience.

Ercan enjoys swimming and nature walks and his strong connection with both the sea and nature enables him to share his love for these elements with his guests. His friendly and hospitable nature makes guests feel at home throughout their time on board. As the captain of UBI BENE, Ercan remains dedicated to providing a safe, enjoyable and unforgettable sailing experience.

He speaks English fluently.

crew.name: Mertcan Cekic
crew.bio:
First Mate Mertcan began his maritime career at a young age and currently serves as the Skilled Sailor and First Mate on UBI BENE, bringing 10 years of experience to the role. With his extensive time at sea and comprehensive training, Mertcan is committed to providing guests with a safe and enjoyable sailing experience.

He has a sailing and 3-star diving certificates, as well as the Skilled Sailor/Seaman certification. Also, Mertcan offers professional service on board while also guiding guests through sailing and water sports. His passion for diving and water sports, combined with his energetic and cheerful personality, allows him to create unforgettable moments for guests.

He works diligently to ensure that his guests have a safe and fun experience and speaks English fluently.

crew.name: Ozgur Orhan
crew.bio:
Chef Ozgur started to his professional journey in 2008 and his connection with the kitchen has been growing for over 17 years. He worked as a Senior Protocol Chef at Fenerbahçe Oﬃcer’s Club for 8 years, honing his skills and expertise.

With a deep passion for both the sea and gastronomy, Ozgur has spent the last 3 years combining sea voyages with culinary excellence, oﬀerring his guests unforgettable gourmet experiences. With His expertise in Mediterranean cuisine and Turkish dishes, he leaves a lasting impression on the palates of those he serves.

Ozgur has received specialized training, earning culinary certificates and hygiene
qualifications. he He likes sports, which help strengthen his connection with nature and the sea. One of his most distinctive qualities is his warm and sincere approach to guests, ensuring they feel valued and appreciated.

Chef Ozgur is committed to delivering a truly unforgettable culinary experience, always prioritizing guest satisfaction. He has strong communication skills and ability to build meaningful relationships with both his team and his guests.

He speaks English.

crew.name: Buse Sadan
crew.bio:
Born in 2002 in Muğla, Turkey, Buse is a dedicated and enthusiastic professional pursuing a career in the yachting industry. After completing her education, she gained valuable onboard experience working as a hostess on the yachts Nevega and Stella Fiera.

Buse is highly motivated, reliable, and passionate about hospitality. With a strong commitment to maritime service, she aims to build a long-term career at sea. Her excellent communication skills and ability to connect with people of all ages and backgrounds contribute to a positive and welcoming onboard atmosphere.

She holds several essential maritime certificates, including, Elementary First Aid Training, Personal Survival Techniques, Designated Security Duties.

She is fluent in English and 2025 will be her 1st year in UBI BENE

crew.name: Buse Capacı
crew.bio:
Stewardess Buse began her maritime journey before 4 years and now she serves as the stewardess on UBI BENE. Equipped with her seaman certification and a solid understanding of maritime practices, Buse works diligently to create a comfortable and enjoyable atmosphere on board.

Buse’s cheerful demeanor and friendly communication style make guests feel at ease. She particularly excels in connecting with children, ensuring that the yacht becomes a relaxing haven for families. Her ability to engage with younger guests allows everyone to unwind and fully enjoy their time on board.

As she likes reading and swimming, Buse is an energy crew member and speaks English fluently.

crew.name: Sercan Suzer
crew.bio:
Sercan began his maritime career at a young age and is currently serving as a seaman on UBI BENE.

With 5 years of experience in the maritime industry, he holds both STCW and Maritime certificates and has worked on both private and commercial yachts. A versatile sailor, Sercan has actively participated in cruising and in-port operations, ranging from technical tasks to deck maintenance, cleaning, and guest services. He is a reliable team player, and maintains a disciplined approach at all times.

Sercan is well-versed in cruising and port procedures in international waters. His years at sea, combined with extensive training, enable him to ensure guests enjoy a safe and unforgettable holiday experience.

He has a public relations certificate. His friendly and approachable nature ensures that every moment on board is enjoyable. Passionate about sharing his love for the sea, he oﬀers guests engaging activities like swimming and water sports. With his knowledge, enthusiasm, and cheerful service, guests can expect a memorable experience.

He speaks English fluently.
